import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import '../styles/Home.css'; import { Users, Calendar, GraduationCap, Shield, TrendingUp, Heart, ArrowRight, CheckCircle, Star } from 'lucide-react'; const Home = () => { const { isAuthenticated } = useAuth(); const features = [ { icon: , title: "Alumni Directory", description: "Connect with fellow alumni, search by graduation year, field of study, or location." }, { icon: , title: "Event Management", description: "Stay updated with alumni events, reunions, and networking opportunities." }, { icon: , title: "Mentorship Program", description: "Get mentored by experienced alumni or mentor current students." }, { icon: , title: "Secure Platform", description: "Your data is protected with enterprise-grade security measures." } ]; const stats = [ { number: "10,000+", label: "Active Alumni" }, { number: "500+", label: "Events Hosted" }, { number: "1,200+", label: "Mentorship Matches" }, { number: "50+", label: "Partner Companies" } ]; const testimonials = [ { name: "Dr. Sarah Johnson", role: "Class of 2010, Software Engineer at Google", content: "AlumniConnect helped me reconnect with my college friends and find amazing mentorship opportunities.", rating: 5 }, { name: "Michael Chen", role: "Class of 2015, Entrepreneur", content: "The platform made it easy to organize our class reunion and stay connected with the community.", rating: 5 }, { name: "Dr. Priya Sharma", role: "Class of 2008, Research Scientist", content: "I've been able to mentor several students through this platform. It's incredibly rewarding.", rating: 5 } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Welcome to AlumniConnect

The centralized platform for alumni data management and engagement

Connect with your alma mater, network with fellow alumni, participate in events, and contribute to the growth of your educational community through mentorship and collaboration.

{!isAuthenticated ? ( <> Get Started Login ) : ( Explore Platform )}
{/* Stats Section */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.number}
{stat.label}
))}
{/* Features Section */}

Why Choose AlumniConnect?

Our platform provides comprehensive tools for alumni engagement, networking, and institutional growth.

{features.map((feature, index) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* Benefits Section */}

Benefits for Everyone

AlumniConnect creates value for all stakeholders in the educational ecosystem.

For Alumni

  • Network with peers
  • Career opportunities
  • Stay connected

For Students

  • Mentorship programs
  • Internship opportunities
  • Career guidance

For Institutions

  • Enhanced reputation
  • Fundraising support
  • Community building
{/* Testimonials Section */}

What Our Alumni Say

Hear from our community members about their AlumniConnect experience.

{testimonials.map((testimonial, index) => (
{[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

"{testimonial.content}"

{testimonial.name}
{testimonial.role}
))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Connect?

Join thousands of alumni who are already building stronger connections through AlumniConnect.

{!isAuthenticated && ( Join Now )}
); }; export default Home;
